topic: xAI Grok API Pricing 2026: Every Model, Context Window, and Cost Compared

competitors.title: Models and Pricing | xAI Docs
key_points: Official xAI API documentation with detailed model pricing
Multiple Grok model variants available through API
Different pricing tiers for reasoning vs non-reasoning models
Context windows up to 2 million tokens
Built-in prompt caching reduces costs for repeated system prompts

competitors.title: Grok API: Pricing, Setup & Access Guide (2026)
key_points: Three main Grok models worth knowing: Grok 4.1 Fast, Grok 4.20, Grok Code Fast 1
Grok 4.1 Fast is $0.20/M input, $0.50/M output with 2M context window
Grok 4.20 is $2.00/M input, $6.00/M output with multi-agent reasoning
Grok Code Fast 1 is $0.20/M input, $1.50/M output optimized for coding
Prompt caching reduces costs: Grok 4.1 Fast drops to $0.05/M input (75% off)
Comparison with competitors: Grok offers better context-to-price ratio vs GPT-5.4 Mini

stats.fact: Grok 4.1 Fast: $0.20/M input tokens, $0.50/M output tokens, 2M context window
Grok 4.20 (flagship reasoning model): $2.00/M input, $6.00/M output, 2M context
Grok Code Fast 1: $0.20/M input, $1.50/M output, 256K context window
Prompt caching reductions: Grok 4.20 drops from $2.00/M to $0.20/M input (90% off)
Built-in tool fees (web search, X search, code execution): $2.50-$5.00 per 1,000 successful tool calls
Grok 4.1 Fast offers 5x more context than GPT-5.4 Mini at a lower per-token price
xAI official endpoint: https://api.x.ai/v1, Ofox.ai endpoint: https://api.ofox.ai/v1
Grok 4.20 is the only model exposing multi-agent architecture at API call level
Grok Code Fast 1 is purpose-built for agentic coding workflows
